lore.bloom_festal.bloom_festal: A humble healing staff. Recovers 2 hp to its target.
lore.bloom_festal.sun_festal: A bright staff to embrace a brand new day. Recovers 6 hp to its target.
lore.bloom_festal.wane_festal: A staff to heal those beyond the horizon. Recovers 5 hp to its target, and has increased range.
lore.bloom_festal.moon_festal: A revitalizing staff to ward misfortune. Recovers 14 hp to its target.
lore.bloom_festal.great_festal: A bountiful staff that heals all within range for 8 hp.
lore.bloom_festal.rewarp_festal: A mysterious staff that teleports the user and nearby players to a designated area.
lore.bloom_festal.pain_festal: A humble harming staff. Deals 2 magic damage to its target. Heals the undead.
lore.bloom_festal.dirge_festal: A mournful staff that harms all within range for 8 hp. Heals the undead.
lore.bloom_festal.revelation_festal: An rod that swaps the effects of healing and harming.
lore.bloom_festal.hexing_rod: A rod that seals away an opponent's strength. Halves the Maximum Health of its target.
lore.bloom_festal.silent_rod: A rod that seals away an opponent's magic. Prevents usage of magic for 10 seconds.
lore.bloom_festal.stillness_rod: A rod that freezes opponents in time. They will be completely still for 3 seconds.
lore.bloom_festal.levin_sword: A unique weapon that can slash be used to cast quick-moving thunder magic that deals 14 magic damage.
lore.bloom_festal.brave_lance: A spear that can be used for particularly swift jabs or can be held out to deal damage while charging.
lore.bloom_festal.guard_naginata: A slow spear that protects the wielder and can be used to jab or can be held out to deal damage while charging.
lore.bloom_festal.eclipse: A forbidden tome. Casts very slow-moving dark magic that is untouchable for 2 seconds before activating. On contact, sets the target's hp to 1. Lethal if already 1 hp.
lore.bloom_festal.nosferatu: A dark tome. Casts slow-moving dark magic that deals 8 magic damage. If damage is dealt, recovers 4 hp.
lore.bloom_festal.thoron: A magical tome. Casts quick-moving thunder magic that deals 14 magic damage.
lore.bloom_festal.rexcalibur: A magical tome. Casts quick-moving wind magic that deals 5 magic damage and heavy knockback. Effective against airborne enemies (3x damage).
lore.bloom_festal.bolganone: A magical tome. Casts fire magic that deals 8 fireball damage and sets enemies hit on fire.
lore.bloom_festal.whirlpool: A magical tome. Casts water magic that deals 4 magic damage (2 damage if immune to drowning). Effective against water-sensitive and burning enemies (3x damage).
